basic_details.job_title: Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for House Keeper, Helper and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Store Keeper-cum-Accountant , Art & Craft-cum-Music Teacher, House Keeper, Helper-cum-Night Watchman
basic_details.short_information: Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur (UBN) has published the Store Keeper-cum-Accountant, Art & Craft-cum-Music Teacher, House Keeper, and Helper-cum-Night Watchman Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 18/2026/UB/2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 contractual positions. Candidates aged between 21 and 45 years and possessing qualifications such as PG (preferably in Commerce)/MBA (Finance) with computer proficiency, Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in Art & Craft, or Under Matric (8th to 10th Fail), depending on the post, are eligible to apply online. The application process is currently active and will

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PG preferably in Commerce/MBA (Finance) with computer proficiency, Bachelor or Diploma in Art & Craft, Under Matric (8th to 10th Fail)
qualification.details: Store Keeper-cum-Accountant: PG preferably in Commerce/MBA (Finance) with computer proficiency. (Preferable 3 years' experience) Art & Craft-cum-Music Teacher: Bachelor or Diploma in Art & Craft (Preferable 3 years' experience) House Keeper: Under Matric (8th to 10th Fail) (Preferable 3 years' experience) Helper-cum-Night Watchman: Under Matric (8th to 10th Fail) (Preferable 3 years' experience)

salary_details.details: Store Keeper-cum-Accountant: Rs. 18,536/- per month Art & Craft-cum-Music Teacher: Rs. 10,000/- per month House Keeper: Rs. 7,944/- per month Helper-cum-Night Watchman: Rs. 7,944/- per month

selection_process: Career Marking Merit List Certificate Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur recruitment is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for various posts including Store Keeper-cum-Accountant, Art & Craft-cum-Music Teacher, House Keeper, and Helper-cum-Night Watchman.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years as of 1st April 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, ranging from Post Graduate degrees in Commerce/MBA for Store Keeper-cum-Accountant, Bachelor's or Diploma in Art & Craft for the teacher post, to Under Matric (8th to 10th Fail) for House Keeper and Helper-cum-Night Watchman.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 7,944/- per month for House Keeper and Helper-cum-Night Watchman to Rs. 18,536/- per month for Store Keeper-cum-Accountant.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on Career Marking, Merit List preparation, and Certificate Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any preferred experiences mentioned for the posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for most posts, 3 years of experience is preferred, although not strictly mandatory for all.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article.
